meta.name: Generate styled PDF or DOCX business reports from Markdown with Autype

name: Generate Styled Markdown Report with Image Upload

parameters.content:
={{ 
'---page{align=center}---

'
+ '![Company Logo](' + $('Company Settings').first().json.companyLogoUrl + '){width=240 align=center}

'
+ '# Business Quarter Report — Q1 2026

'
+ '**Prepared for:** Leadership Team  
'
+ '**Reporting period:** January – March 2026

'
+ '![Operations Dashboard](' + $json.refPath + '){width=520 align=center caption="Operations dashboard snapshot"}

'
+ '---/page---

'
+ '## Executive Summary

'
+ 'Q1 delivered stable revenue growth, stronger retention, and improved delivery throughput. The team focused on enterprise expansion, onboarding optimization, and faster issue resolution.

'
+ '### Key outcomes

'
+ '- Revenue grew by **14.8 %** quarter-over-quarter
'
+ '- Gross margin improved from **61 %** to **64 %**
'
+ '- Churn dropped from **3.1 %** to **2.4 %**
'
+ '- Net Revenue Retention reached **112 %**

'
+ '## Financial Overview

'
+ '| Metric | Q4 2025 | Q1 2026 | Change |
'
+ '|--------|---------|---------|--------|
'
+ '| Revenue | $2.44 M | $2.80 M | +14.8 % |
'
+ '| Gross Margin | 61 % | 64 % | +3 pp |
'
+ '| EBITDA | $0.52 M | $0.66 M | +26.9 % |
'
+ '| New ARR | $0.38 M | $0.49 M | +28.9 % |

'
+ '## Revenue by Region

'
+ ':::chart{type=bar title="Regional Revenue (USD)" caption="Regional performance Q1 2026"}
'
+ 'labels: North America, DACH, UKI, Nordics
'
+ 'dataset: Q1 2026 | 1160000, 690000, 530000, 420000
'
+ ':::

'
+ '---

'
+ '## Operational KPIs

'
+ ':::chart{type=line title="Monthly Pipeline Conversion"}
'
+ 'labels: Jan, Feb, Mar
'
+ 'dataset: Conversion Rate (%) | 28, 31, 34
'
+ ':::
'
}}

markdownAdditionalFields.title: ={{ $('Company Settings').first().json.companyName + ' — Quarter Report Q1 2026' }}
markdownAdditionalFields.defaults: ={{ JSON.stringify({ fontFamily: $('Company Settings').first().json.fontFamily, fontSize: 11, lineHeight: 1.45, color: $('Company Settings').first().json.textColor, chart: { colors: [$('Company Settings').first().json.primaryColor, $('Company Settings').first().json.secondaryColor, '#f59e0b'] }, styles: { h1: { fontSize: 26, fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#0f172a' }, h2: { fontSize: 17, fontWeight: 'bold', color: $('Company Settings').first().json.primaryColor }, h3: { fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#334155' }, table: { header: { backgroundColor: '#e2e8f0', color: '#0f172a', fontWeight: 'bold' }, rows: { alternateBackgroundColor: '#f8fafc' }, borders: { outer: { width: 1, color: '#cbd5e1', style: 'solid' }, inner: { width: 0.5, color: '#e2e8f0', style: 'solid' } }, cellPadding: { top: 6, right: 8, bottom: 6, left: 8 } } }, header: { left: { type: 'image', src: $('Company Settings').first().json.companyLogoUrl, width: 56, align: 'left' }, right: $('Company Settings').first().json.companyName, excludeFirstPage: true }, footer: { center: 'Page ${pageNumber} / ${totalPages}' } }) }}

parameters.content:
## Generate Styled Markdown Report with Image Upload
This workflow renders a business quarter report from **Extended Markdown** with full styling, charts, tables, and a temporarily uploaded image.

### How it works
1. **Company Settings** — Set company name, logo URL, brand colors, font, and a report image URL. Change these to match your brand.
2. **Download Report Image** — Fetches the image from the URL as binary data.
3. **Upload Temp Image** — Uploads the image to Autype as a temporary rendering image (expires after 24 h). Returns a `refPath` like `/temp-image/{id}`.
4. **Render Markdown Report** — Sends the Extended Markdown content to Autype. The markdown references the uploaded image via its `refPath`. Styling defaults (fonts, colors, header with logo, footer with page numbers) are passed as JSON.

### Setup
1. Install **n8n-nodes-autype** via **Settings → Community Nodes** (self-hosted n8n only).
2. Get your API key at [app.autype.com](https://app.autype.com) → [API Keys](https://docs.autype.com/getting-started/editor/settings#api-keys).
3. Add an **Autype API** credential in n8n with your API key.
4. Select your credential in the Autype node.

### Customization
- Change output format: set `outputType` to `docx` or `odt` in the Render node.
- Edit the markdown content directly in the Render node's **Markdown Content** field.
- Adjust defaults JSON for different fonts, colors, or header/footer layout.

> ⚠️ This workflow uses the Autype community node and requires **self-hosted n8n**.

### 1. Company Settings
Brand colors, font, logo URL, and report image URL. Easy to swap for different companies.

### 2. Mock Image Download & Image Upload
Download an image → upload to Autype as temp image → get `refPath` for use in markdown.

### 3. Render
Markdown content + defaults JSON → Autype renders PDF/DOCX. The uploaded image `refPath` is used directly as the image `src`.
